Requirement: The system shall store every area with validated geometry and source/provenance metadata.
Acceptance Criteria: Area geometry can be queried spatially and has confidence/source fields.

Requirement: The system shall support parcels, polygons, localities, watersheds, corridors, and generated candidates.
Acceptance Criteria: Area type enum supports all MVP and future area categories.

Requirement: The system shall store report runs as reproducible artifacts with source manifests.
Acceptance Criteria: A report run includes source versions, rule version, method versions, and timestamp.

Requirement: The system shall maintain a source registry before using any dataset.
Acceptance Criteria: Every dataset version references a source registry row.

Requirement: The system shall store license/entitlement attributes per source.
Acceptance Criteria: Display/export/cache/AI-use flags are available to policy checks.

Requirement: The system shall record failed source lookups as evidence.
Acceptance Criteria: Source failures appear in report unknowns.

Requirement: The system shall store immutable raw source snapshots where license permits.
Acceptance Criteria: Dataset version rows have checksums and storage URIs.

Requirement: The system shall validate CRS, geometry validity, row counts, and schema drift on ingest.
Acceptance Criteria: Ingest run stores validation metrics and warnings.

Requirement: The system shall preserve source-native attributes in JSON alongside normalized fields.
Acceptance Criteria: Source schema changes do not destroy unknown fields.

Requirement: The system shall support local/jurisdiction adapters.
Acceptance Criteria: New county/state sources can be added without core schema rewrite.

Requirement: The system shall compute flood/wetland intersection metrics for an area.
Acceptance Criteria: Evidence records include intersection area/percent.

Requirement: The system shall compute slope/elevation metrics.
Acceptance Criteria: Evidence/metrics include mean/max/percentile slope or buildable-area proxy.

Requirement: The system shall compute road/access proximity as proxy evidence only.
Acceptance Criteria: Claim language states physical proximity does not prove legal access.

Requirement: The system shall compute nearest environmental regulated facilities where source data is available.
Acceptance Criteria: Evidence includes distance, facility ID, and source date.

Requirement: The system shall store evidence separately from claims.
Acceptance Criteria: Claims join to evidence through claim_evidence table.

Requirement: The system shall support negative evidence and source-failure evidence.
Acceptance Criteria: Reports distinguish none found vs source unavailable.

Requirement: Evidence shall include method code and method version.
Acceptance Criteria: Every evidence row has method_code/method_version.

Requirement: Every claim shall link to at least one evidence item unless it is explicitly marked as a source failure/unknown claim.
Acceptance Criteria: Claim-evidence link exists or unknown reason is present.

Requirement: Claims shall include confidence and severity bands.
Acceptance Criteria: Reports display both fields.

Requirement: High and critical claims shall generate verification tasks.
Acceptance Criteria: Verification task row created.

Requirement: Hard gates shall execute before weighted scoring.
Acceptance Criteria: Rule run output shows gate results before suitability band.

Requirement: Rulesets shall be versioned and immutable after report publication.
Acceptance Criteria: Report references rule_version_id.

Requirement: Suitability and confidence shall be reported separately.
Acceptance Criteria: Report has both suitability band and confidence summary.

Requirement: Reports shall include executive summary, red flags, unknowns, verification tasks, and source appendix.
Acceptance Criteria: Report template includes required sections.

Requirement: Reports shall avoid definitive legal/title/survey/appraisal wording.
Acceptance Criteria: Safe-language lint passes.

Requirement: Reports shall include machine-readable JSON output.
Acceptance Criteria: Report run has machine_json_uri.

Requirement: Golden parcels shall be maintained for regression tests.
Acceptance Criteria: Regression suite includes known flood/wetland/access/zoning cases.

Requirement: All beta reports shall receive human review.
Acceptance Criteria: Report status cannot become approved without reviewer action.

Requirement: The system shall log per-report cost metrics.
Acceptance Criteria: Report run contains cost_metrics JSON.

Requirement: Workspace-level access control shall protect user/report data.
Acceptance Criteria: All area/report queries scoped to workspace.

Requirement: Data-license entitlements shall control display and export.
Acceptance Criteria: Export path checks source flags.

Requirement: The MVP shall not use protected-class demographic variables for scoring.
Acceptance Criteria: No protected-class inputs exist in MVP ruleset.

Requirement: The MVP shall not position outputs as mortgage AVMs or appraisals.
Acceptance Criteria: Report contains valuation disclaimer and no collateral-value output.

Requirement: Source onboarding shall require license review, QA, and documented caveats.
Acceptance Criteria: Source status cannot be production without checklist.

Requirement: Reviewer overrides shall preserve original evidence and be audited.
Acceptance Criteria: Audit event written for override.

Requirement: Report generation shall be asynchronous and idempotent.
Acceptance Criteria: POST /reports accepts idempotency key and returns job/report ID.

Requirement: API responses shall distinguish false, unknown, missing, and source failed.
Acceptance Criteria: Response schema includes status fields.

Requirement: Core area/evidence/claim schemas shall not hard-code U.S.-specific legal terms.
Acceptance Criteria: Jurisdiction-specific fields live in adapters/metadata.

Requirement: Global reports shall state diligence tier.
Acceptance Criteria: Tier 0/1/2 label appears in global outputs.
